scripts.supabase:deploy-functions: supabase functions deploy aprovar-solicitacao --no-verify-jwt && supabase functions deploy rejeitar-solicitacao --no-verify-jwt && supabase functions deploy listar-solicitacoes-pendentes --no-verify-jwt && supabase functions deploy send-email --no-verify-jwt && supabase functions deploy meta-conversions --no-verify-jwt
scripts.build: npm run generate:og-image && npm run generate:pwa-icons && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs && tsc -b && vite build
